name: 2022-SVCA讀經計劃D
description:
編排說明
一、 本日程目的盼望幫助兄姊每年均能讀完新舊約的聖經一遍。
二、 每年共有五十二週多一天，但通常每年年頭各地均有特別聚會比較忙碌，有每年元旦不一定就是禮拜一，故為了方便計算，本日程特照五十週來安排，年初與年尾均不安排。
三、 本日程主日也不安排，以便溫習或補讀上週內所未讀過的。
四、 本日程新約平均每日安排讀一章；若一章較長，就分二天讀。
五、 本日程將舊約分為歷史、詩歌與先知書三部分一起讀。每日讀歷史書一章或二章，詩歌與先知書則每日讀半章或一章。
六、 本日程每天從應讀新約中選出一節經節列為應背經節，作背誦之用。為方便起見不寫章數，只寫節數。
七、 每天應讀聖經可以用一段時間讀。也可以分四段時間來讀：早晨讀新約，午後讀舊約歷史書，晚上讀先知書，睡前讀詩歌。
八、 每天讀畢可在日程表上作一記號，以便主日或年尾或其他日子將未讀的補讀之。
九、 應讀經文中，中文數字為章數，阿拉伯數字為節數。
十、本日程從一九六九年起，以鉛印出版；一九七〇年又改為25開本。每年出版一本。原是照每年第一個禮拜一排上日月，以便兄姊照著印上之月日按次序讀之，以成進度，以期一年讀完一遍，故稱讀經日程。
十一、 有人建議把四福音分開讀，我們覺得也無不可，並且在有的地方也有人實行，為此我們另外編排了「細讀新約一遍進度表」，讀者讀新約時，可照聖經排列之次序讀，如日程內所排的，也可選用該進度表讀。
十二、 日程表後，另有「主日選讀聖經進度表」、「速度新約四邊進度表」及「細讀新約一遍進度表」，兄姊們可自行選用。
十三、 本日程為通用本，不排定月日，以便兄姊自填。
description_en:
Arrangement Description
1. The purpose of this agenda is to help brothers and sisters to read the Old and New Testament Bibles once a year.
2. There are fifty-two weeks and more than one day each year, but usually, there are special gatherings in various places of the year and it is quite busy. New Year's Day is not necessarily Monday. Therefore, for the convenience of calculation, this schedule is arranged in 50 weeks. Neither the beginning of the year nor the end of the year will be arranged.
3. The main day of this schedule is also not arranged so that you can review or re-read what you haven't read in the last week.
4. The New Testament in this schedule is arranged to read one chapter a day on average; if a chapter is longer, it will be read in two days.
5. This schedule divides the Old Testament into three parts: history, poetry, and prophets to read together. Read one or two chapters of history books every day, and read half or one chapter every day for poetry and prophets.
6. This schedule selects a verse from the New Testament to be read every day as the verse to be memorized for memorization. For convenience, the chapter number is not written, only the section number.
7. The Bible can be read for a period of time every day. You can also read it in four periods: reading the New Testament in the morning, reading the Old Testament history books in the afternoon, reading the prophets in the evening, and reading poetry before going to bed.
8. After reading each day, you can make a mark on the calendar so that the unread ones can be read on Sunday or the end of the year, or other days.
9. In the scriptures to be read, Chinese numbers are chapters and Arabic numbers are verses.
10. This schedule has been published in printed form since 1969; it was changed to a 25-format version in 1970. One book is published every year. Originally, the sun and the moon are arranged in a row according to the first week of each year, so that the brothers and sisters can read them in order according to the printed month and day, so as to achieve progress and complete the reading once a year, so it is called the Bible reading schedule.

name: 2022-SVCA讀經計劃A
description_en: Read the whole Bible in a year

name: 2022-SVCA讀經計劃B
description: 舊約摩西五經及歷史書
description_en: Read Old Testament Pentateuch and History Books in a year

name: 2022-SVCA讀經計劃C
description: 四福音書、使徒行傳和詩篇、箴言
description_en: Read four Gospels, Acts, and Psalms, Proverbs in a year
